query:
SELECT e.id, e.firstName, e.lastName, e.entityId, b.name as entityName 
FROM employees e 
LEFT JOIN business_entities b ON e.entityId = b.id 
WHERE e.firstName = 'Cornelius';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT e.id, e.firstName, e.lastName, e.entityId, b.name as entityName 
FROM employees e 
LEFT JOIN business_entities b ON e.entityId = b.id 
WHERE e.firstName = 'Cornelius';
